coupling.note: All new imports from already-depended packages. showToast from @opencode-ai/ui/toast (same package). Semaphore extends 'effect' (already imported with 7 symbols). ErrorBoundary from solid-js (core dep, same import line pattern as app.tsx). produce_fragment isolation correct for ipc.ts.

debuggability.note: Fix B double-toast regression — belt-and-suspenders creates worse UX than original silent failure. Fix E semaphore has zero diagnostic surface — leaked permits cause permanent silent hang. Fix C dialog closes on save failure with no feedback. Fix F ErrorBoundary ignores error object. Fix A validation has no user feedback — user clicks Save, nothing happens. Only Fix D has adequate debuggability.

convergence.note: Orthogonal to PG migration — desktop config persistence is separate from operational database. Semaphore follows established file-lock.ts pattern. Additive-only approach correct. Gaps: FI-011 (P0: auth.remove empty catch) not addressed in same file; semaphore+watch() path underspecified (runs via bridge.promise, not Effect); Effect.withSpan missing on 5 throw/defect paths in mcp/index.ts (out of scope but same file plan edits).

surface_area.note: Zero breaking changes. All 4 public interface changes are non-breaking widenings. 4 files directly edited, 0 consumer files need co-changes. All changes are additive guards/wrappers.

testability.note: Bimodal: Fix E semaphore (4/5) — extract withServerLock for Effect unit tests. Fix C type change (5/5) — typecheck validates. Fix A validation (3/5) — isValidMcpEntry pure, but form guards signal-coupled. Fix B (2/5) — needs full TanStack Query rendering. Fix D (1/5) — needs Electron runtime. Fix F (2/5) — needs component that throws.

error_clarity.note: Fix B double-toast confuses UX with 2 simultaneous identical popups. Fix B toast missing server name — 'MCP Error: connect ECONNREFUSED' with no server identifier. Fix E semaphore has zero error surface — no log, no timeout warning. Fix F fallback ignores err.message — user sees generic text. Fix A validation silently does nothing. Fix D IPC error format unspecified. Effect.withSpan missing on 5 throw/defect paths — production crashes invisible in traces.

reversibility.note: Flat dependency graph — all 6 fix groups fully independent. Any subset revertable without compilation errors or cascading failures. Fix A/C touch same file in different regions (body vs signature).

objections.finding: BLOCKING: Double-toast bug in Fix B. Belt-and-suspenders pattern: try/catch in mutationFn shows toast AND re-throws into onError which shows second toast. User sees two identical toasts. Neither includes server name — can't tell WHICH of 5+ MCP servers failed.
objections.repair_path: Remove re-throw from mutationFn catch OR remove onError. Pick ONE error surface. Include server name: `Server '${name}': ${err.message}`.

objections.finding: BLOCKING: Semaphore deadlock invisible (Fix E). withPermits(1) has no timeout — if createAndStore hangs, permit is leaked forever. Server permanently blocked. Zero logging — dev spends 30-60min tracing through Effect internals with no diagnostic output.
objections.repair_path: Add Effect.timeout('30s') around withPermits(1). Log lock acquire/release with server name and Effect.withSpan.

objections.finding:
BLOCKING: ErrorBoundary fallback ignores error object (Fix F). SolidJS fallback receives (err, reset). Plan uses fallback={() =>

MCP dialog error

} which ignores both. No error.message in UI, no console.error, no Sentry capture. Contrast with app.tsx which passes error to ErrorPage.
objections.repair_path:
fallback={(err, reset) => { console.error('MCP dialog:', err); return
{(err as Error).message}
}}

objections.finding: BLOCKING: isValidMcpEntry conflation (Fix A). Adding command.length > 0 to storage type guard silently DROPS previously saved entries on read. isValidMcpEntry is corruption detection, not input validation.
objections.repair_path: Add command.length > 0 and timeout > 0 to handleSave (input path in dialog-edit-mcp.tsx), not isValidMcpEntry. Keep storage validation permissive for backward compatibility.

high_severity.finding: Fix A validation has no user feedback. User clicks Save on empty command/invalid URL — nothing happens, dialog closes. No toast, no inline error. The existing <span class='text-text-critical'> error display exists in the add form but is never populated on URL parse failure.
high_severity.repair_path: Set inline error on validation failure: if (!URL.canParse(url)) { setStore('addForm', 'error', 'Invalid URL'); return }. Don't close dialog on validation failure.

high_severity.finding: FI-011 P0 gap: empty catch {} on auth.remove swallows all errors. If auth.remove fails (network, permission), credentials may remain stored while server entry is deleted — orphaned credential leak.
high_severity.repair_path: Change catch {} to catch (e) { console.warn('Failed to remove auth for', name, e); } — one-line fix in same file.

high_severity.finding: Fix E underspecifies watch() integration. watch() notification handler runs via client.setNotificationHandler → bridge.promise() — NOT inside Effect context. Plan only describes wrapping Effect.gen functions. Semaphore must be acquired INSIDE the async callback.
Fix C silent save failure. handleSave becomes async and awaits onSave, but no try/catch. Error propagates as unhandled rejection. Dialog always closes — user gets zero feedback.
high_severity.repair_path: try { await props.onSave(entry); dialog.close() } catch(e) { showToast({ title: 'Save failed', description: String(e), variant: 'error' }) }

high_severity.finding: Effect.withSpan missing on 5 throw/defect paths in mcp/index.ts (~557, ~562, ~576, ~630, ~635). 4 throw new Error() calls bypass Effect's trace system entirely — Effect.fn('MCP.*') span hierarchy orphaned. Effect.die(error) at ~576 has no annotations. Production crash traces are invisible.
high_severity.repair_path: Convert throw to yield* Effect.fail(...). Add Effect.annotateCurrentSpan({ 'mcp.name': name }) before Effect.die. Add Effect.withSpan to connectRemote/connectLocal transport creation.

conditions: Fix B: Remove double-toast — pick one error surface. Include server name in toast.
Fix E: Add Effect.timeout('30s') + logging. Cover watch() bridge.promise path explicitly.
Fix F: Log error, show err.message in UI, expose reset() for retry.
Fix A: Add validation + inline error in handleSave, NOT in isValidMcpEntry.
Fix C: Add try/catch around await with toast on failure.
FI-011: Fix empty catch on auth.remove — add console.warn.
Fix A: Add user-facing inline error message on validation failure instead of silent non-action.
subagent_reports_used: surface-area-mapper: Score 1/5 (excellent — zero breaking changes, 0 consumer co-changes)
debuggability-forecaster: Score 2/5 (blocking — double-toast, invisible semaphore, silent saves)
isolation-tester: Score 2.8/5 (adequate — Fix E semaphore highest test value, rest need full env)
convergence-checker: Score 4.4/5 (good — FI-011 gap, watch() path underspecified, orthogonal to PG)
error-trace-auditor: Score 3/5 (borderline — validation lacks feedback, Effect.withSpan missing, throw bypasses Effect trace)
